source_evidence.source_of_truth_note: CLI-generated files and command outputs are the source of truth. This summary is a secondary review aid.

messages: The required generated JSON files passed deterministic schema validation.

report.summary_text: The deterministic report lists 6 catalog entries, 4 catalog warnings, 1 overlap candidate, and no failed parses.

findings.title: Weekly Review metadata needs human review

evidence.message: The diagnostic is partial and lists weak_description, missing_outputs, missing_output_contract, and missing_examples.

findings.title: Two summarization skills are a duplicate candidate

evidence.message: skills-summarize-docs-skill and skills-summarize-notes-skill have deterministic overlap confidence 0.81 and require human review.

review_items: Review the Weekly Review prompt's description, outputs, output contract, and example coverage.
Compare the two summarization skills before any correction, consolidation, deletion, or cross-reference decision.
Review the source and generated outputs before any sharing or publication decision.

limitations: This summary does not certify safety, privacy, correctness, completeness, approval, or publication readiness.
Warnings and overlap candidates are review prompts, not decisions.
Private source collections and their generated outputs remain private.

next_actions.description: Inspect the Weekly Review source metadata and the cited deterministic warning evidence.
Have an authorized human decide whether the two summarization skills should remain separate, be cross-referenced, or be consolidated.
Rerun the deterministic report after regenerated catalog outputs are available.
